dialogues: Here's data about marbles. Look at the biggest number: 23. That's pretty small!
This graph is horizontal. The bars go sideways. Let's check which scales fit. Try clicking each scale.
You got them all. All four scales fit! Let's look at Scale of 1.
Click Scale of 1 to see what it looks like.
Right. It works. Every number lands exactly. But look at all those lines on the side!
